summary: Coach Watch State-Copy Matrix and Transition Explanation Layer - All tests passed. Backend returns all new fields (headline, whyLine, previousState, currentState, stateChangedAt, stateChangeReason, whatChangedCopy, triggeringSignals). Frontend CoachWatchCard correctly displays headline and why-line with proper data-testid attributes. State persistence working - whatChangedCopy correctly returns null when state unchanged.

State persistence uses coach_watch_states MongoDB collection with tenant_id + program_id as key
Transition explanations defined in _TRANSITION_COPY dict for 10 state transitions
State names correctly updated: waiting_for_signal, follow_up_window_open, emerging_interest
Frontend CoachWatchCard.js has proper data-testid attributes: cw-headline, cw-why-line, cw-what-changed
whatChangedCopy conditionally rendered only when not null (line 79-86 in CoachWatchCard.js)
